name: Spooktacular Chocolate Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Line a standard muffin pan with paper baking cups.
3. In a large bowl, stir together the dry ingredients: flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, salt, and baking powder.
4. Add shortening, buttermilk, water, eggs, and vanilla extract to the dry mixture. Beat on low speed of an electric mixer for 30 seconds, scraping the bowl constantly.
5. Increase the speed to high and beat for 3 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
6. Fill each paper cup about one-third full with batter.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean. Remove from the pan and let cool completely on a wire rack.
Peanut Butter Cream Filling Instructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together cream cheese and peanut butter until well blended.
2. Add milk and vanilla extract; beat well.
3. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating until smooth. If needed, add additional milk, 1 teaspoon at a time, to achieve the desired consistency.
4. Pipe the filling onto cupcakes using a pastry bag fitted with a large star tip. Fill each cupcake.
5. Remove the tip from the cupcakes and garnish with swirls of filling on top. Decorate with assorted candies if desired.
6. Cover any leftover cupcakes and refrigerate. Yields about 3 dozen cupcakes.
